title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
